title: MES - Moog's End Structures
description: Lots of Vanilla styled structrues to fill up the end dimension with life!
body:
![banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MES/BH_ME_HEADER.webp) [![Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/D1D8LKA5N) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/869218732650688543?color=9033af&label=DISCORD&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.com/invite/S5nffJbuvA) [![My projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-projects-9033af?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/finndog_123/projects) [![My projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-projects-9033af?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/FinnDog_123) ![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MES/BH_ME_BANNER1.webp) This Mod works for Forge, Fabric, NeoForge, and Quilt! It can also be installed server-side only. Forge support was dropped after 1.20.4 ### ABOUT Moog's End Structures breathes new life into the End dimension by introducing a range of new structures that blend perfectly with the existing landscape. Each structure is crafted with care using vanilla blocks and entities to keep that classic Minecraft feel. As you explore the End, you'll come across unique challenges, tough enemies, and valuable loot. This mod works with any modpack and can be installed alongside Moog's Voyager Structures (MVS) for an even richer gameplay experience. Dive into the End with Moog's End Structures and discover the hidden treasures that await! To see all of the structures, head to the [previews website](https://previews.moogsmods.com/end-structures/1.21.1/). See our main structure mod, MVS, [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moogs-voyager-structures). ### Biomes O Plenty Compatibility Datapack I've built a specific compatibility datapack for Moog's End Structures to enhance its integration with the popular mod, **Biomes O Plenty**. This datapack switches out the style of some of our existing structures to use blocks from BOP, creating a more cohesive and immersive experience when both mods are installed. You can find and download the compatibility datapack [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/coming-soon). ### Config pack Every aspect of the mod is customizable using datapacks. A template with full instructions can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mes-moogs-end-structures-(config-pack)) ![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MES/BH_ME_BANNER2.webp) ![collage](https://imgur.com/YPIvnN1.png) ![showcase](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MES/BH_ME_BANNER2.webp) ### VIDEOS
[![MinecraftStorage](https://imgur.com/ApCtgr7.png)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/mes-moogs-end-structures) ### MODPACKS See all modpacks [here](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/finder?included_mods=46028). ![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MES/BH_ME_BANNER3.webp) The best and fastest way to get replies is to join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/S5nffJbuvA). [![BHsponser](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MES/BH_ME_PROMO.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/moogsmods?r=mres)
